_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTDL_v2
name: Farming Simulator 25 Wine noVNC
author: eggs@unrealstudios.ca
description: Runs the Windows Farming Simulator 25 dedicated server under Wine. Includes a browser-based noVNC desktop for the required GIANTS license activation. Requires the companion fs25-pterodactyl Docker image and legally obtained GIANTS ESD installer/server license; no paid game files are included.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

mkdir -p /mnt/server/installer \
         /mnt/server/dlc \
         /mnt/server/game \
         /mnt/server/config \
         /mnt/server/setup-logs

cat > /mnt/server/UPLOAD_INSTALLER_HERE.txt <<'EOF'
FARMING SIMULATOR 25 SERVER SETUP
=================================

1. Download the Windows ESD installer from your GIANTS account.
2. Upload the .img installer into the /installer folder.
3. Start the server with AUTO_INSTALL=true and AUTOSTART_SERVER=false.
4. Open the noVNC allocation (default port 6080) in a browser.
5. Complete installation and activate the separate dedicated-server license.
6. Restart the server and set AUTOSTART_SERVER=true.

The Steam edition is not supported by this image's installation flow.
No game or license files are downloaded by this egg.
EOF

echo "FS25 folder structure created successfully."

variables.name: Server name
variables.description: Name shown in the Farming Simulator server browser.

variables.name: Game password
variables.description: Password players use to join. Leave blank for no game password.

variables.name: Maximum players
variables.description: Maximum simultaneous players. Farming Simulator 25 supports up to 16.

variables.name: Map ID
variables.description: Map identifier. The default is MapUS; enter another compatible official or mod map identifier when needed.

variables.name: Language/region
variables.description: Server language code, such as en, fr, de, or es.

variables.name: Web admin username
variables.description: Username for the Farming Simulator web administration page.

variables.name: Web admin password
variables.description: Password for the Farming Simulator web administration page.

variables.name: noVNC password
variables.description: Password for the browser desktop used during installation and license activation.

variables.name: Auto-install
variables.description: Automatically launch the interactive installer when an ESD image is found and setup is incomplete.

variables.name: Server startup mode
variables.description: false starts only the desktop; true starts the game and web admin; web_only starts only the web admin.

variables.name: Dark web admin
variables.description: Use the dark theme in the FS25 web administration interface.

variables.name: Pause behavior
variables.description: FS25 dedicated server pause mode. The recommended dedicated-server default is 2.

variables.name: Save interval
variables.description: Automatic save interval value passed to the dedicated server.

variables.name: Statistics interval
variables.description: Statistics interval value passed to the dedicated server.

variables.name: Browser title
variables.description: Title displayed on the noVNC browser tab.
